chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, AT KARACHI Const. Petition No.D-451 of 2026 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date: order with signature(s) of Judge(s) --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of Main Case. 26.03.2026. Mr. Saleem Michael, advocate for the petitioner. Barrister Asad Ahmed, advocate for the respondent/KMC. Mr. Abdul Jalil Zuberi, Asstt. Advocate General, Sindh. ---------- Ms. Sana Abid, Advocate, files her memo of appearance on behalf of Town Municipal Corporation (Mauripur), which is taken on record. The petitioners have filed the instant petition for release of pensionary benefits. The KMC counsel opposes it, stating that each petitioner must file a separate petition based on their own cause of action. The learned counsel for the petitioners submits that he needs permission to file fresh petitions. Accordingly, without touching the merits of the case, the instant petition is disposed of, with the observation that each individual petitioner shall file separate petition, which shall be decided on their own merits. JUDGE JUDGE Manthar Brohi
